message:
feat(crypto,google-discovery): add CWT principal_id accessor and deterministic JSON test canonicalization

- fcp-crypto/cose.rs: add CwtClaims::get_principal_id() for FCP2
  backward-compatible principal extraction from capability tokens
- fcp-google-discovery/generator.rs: add canonicalize_json_value()
  helper for deterministic test comparison regardless of serde_json
  Map ordering (BTreeMap vs IndexMap from preserve_order feature)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
